races.name: Galitarko
races.description: A resilient people guided by philosophy, possessing the imposing form of powerful bears. Galitarkos value community and wisdom as much as their physical strength.

subraces.name: Panda
subraces.description: Known for their altruism and communal harmony, Pandas often act as mediators and keepers of peace.

subraces.name: Polar
subraces.description: Solitary nomads who prioritize the survival of their immediate group in the harshest environments.

subraces.name: Grizzly
subraces.description: Imposing warriors and builders who work tirelessly for the common good of their people.

gal_claws.name: Claws
gal_claws.description: Your claws are natural weapons. You deal 1d6 + Strength modifier Slashing damage instead of the normal bludgeoning damage for unarmed strikes.

gal_mauling_strike.name: Mauling Strike
gal_mauling_strike.description: Immediately after you move at least 6 meters, you can make one melee attack with your claws as a Bonus Action.

gal_bearable.name: Bearable
gal_bearable.description: You count as one size larger when determining your carrying capacity and the weight you can push, drag, or lift.

pan_climber.name: High Climber
pan_climber.description: You have a climbing speed equal to your walking speed.

pan_bearfriend.name: Bearfriend
pan_bearfriend.description: You gain proficiency and have Advantage on Charisma (Persuasion) checks.

pan_rollup.name: Roll-Up
pan_rollup.description: If you are not wearing heavy armor and are knocked prone, you are pushed 1.5m instead. Standing up costs only 1.5m of movement.

pol_swim.name: Freezing Waters
pol_swim.description: You have a swimming speed equal to your walking speed.

pol_keen_sight.name: Keen Sight
pol_keen_sight.description: You have Advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

pol_bearly_ready.name: Bearly Ready
pol_bearly_ready.description: When rolling Initiative, you can grant Advantage to an ally within 9m, but you suffer Disadvantage on your own Initiative roll.

griz_keen_smell.name: Keen Smell
griz_keen_smell.description: You have Advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.

griz_bearware.name: Bearware
griz_bearware.description: An additional creature is required to successfully flank you or affect you with pack tactics.
